summary: Fixed biome transition not triggering after CONFIRM TRAVEL. Root cause: _on_travel_completed was a coroutine (contained await) connected as a signal handler to NavigationSystem.travel_completed. When the signal fires synchronously inside initiate_travel(), the coroutine suspends at await _fade_out() within the signal emission call stack, and the tween's finished signal cannot properly resume it. Fix: split _on_travel_completed into a synchronous signal handler (sets _is_transitioning guard) and a separate _execute_travel_transition coroutine that runs the async fade/swap/fade sequence in a clean call context. Added comprehensive logging at every transition phase. Ticket left as IN_PROGRESS with READY FOR STUDIO HEAD SIGN-OFF per hold condition.
